issues.description: Action type should be 'GiveKeyword' to grant 'Cannot be Rested' status, not 'Rest' which actively rests the character

Missing duration specification. Text 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' indicates a timed effect that should have duration:'UntilEndOfOpponentNextTurn' or similar time-bound duration, not a permanent effect
Effect should grant keyword 'CannotBeRested' with duration constraint, not perform an immediate Rest action

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 8 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.
